hero.title: Master the Art of Riding
hero.subtitle: Join 15,000+ GCC riders on their journey from beginner to confident road master. Learn safety, control, and the freedom of the open road.

why.title: Why Learn With Us?
why.subtitle: Most riders learn through trial and error—dangerous and inefficient. We've built the comprehensive system that transforms beginners into confident riders.

card1.title: Safety First
card1.description: Learn proper techniques that prevent accidents and build lifelong safe riding habits from day one.

card2.title: Expert Instructors
card2.description: Our instructors are certified professionals with decades of experience on GCC roads.

card3.title: Real Road Skills
card3.description: From traffic navigation to emergency maneuvers—skills that matter in real-world situations.

card4.title: Community Support
card4.description: Join a brotherhood of 15,000+ riders who support and learn from each other.

journey.title: Your Path to Mastery
journey.subtitle: A structured journey designed to take you from complete beginner to confident rider

step1.title: Basics & Safety
step1.description: Understand your machine, gear essentials, and fundamental safety protocols.

step2.title: Control & Balance
step2.description: Master throttle control, braking techniques, and low-speed maneuvering.

step3.title: Road Skills
step3.description: Navigate traffic, handle intersections, and read road conditions.

step4.title: Advanced Riding
step4.description: Corner like a pro, handle emergencies, and ride in all conditions.

learn.title: What You'll Master
learn.subtitle: Comprehensive curriculum designed for real-world riding excellence

community.title: Join the Brotherhood
community.subtitle: 15,000+ riders across the GCC have chosen to learn the right way

cta.title: Ready to Ride?
cta.subtitle: Your journey to becoming a confident, skilled rider starts with a single step.

aboutUs.title: About BIKERZ
aboutUs.subtitle: We're on a mission to make motorcycle riding safer and more accessible for everyone in the GCC region.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: BIKERZ was founded by a group of passionate riders who saw a critical gap in motorcycle education across the GCC. Too many riders were learning through dangerous trial and error, leading to preventable accidents and injuries.
story.paragraph2: We built a comprehensive learning platform that combines expert instruction, interactive content, and a supportive community to transform beginners into confident, safe riders. Today, we're proud to have helped thousands of riders across Saudi Arabia and the Gulf region.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide world-class motorcycle education that prioritizes safety, builds confidence, and creates a community of responsible riders who share our passion for the open road.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the leading motorcycle education platform in the Middle East, reducing riding accidents and building a culture of safety-first riding across the GCC.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide everything we do

safety.title: Safety First
safety.description: Every lesson, every tip, every piece of content is designed with rider safety as the top priority.

community.title: Community
community.description: We believe in the power of riders helping riders, sharing knowledge and supporting each other.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We strive for the highest quality in our content, instruction, and learner experience.

passion.title: Passion
passion.description: We're riders ourselves, and that passion drives us to create the best learning experience possible.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your riding journey

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy is important to us. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.contactUs: Contact our privacy team for more information.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our platform and services.
terms.welcome: Welcome to BIKERZ. By using our platform, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. Please read them carefully before using our services.
terms.contactUs: Contact our support team for clarification.

registration.title: Account Registration
registration.content: To access our courses, you must register for an account. You agree to provide accurate and complete information during registration and to keep your account information updated. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.

payments.title: Payments and Refunds
payments.content: Course fees are clearly displayed at the time of purchase. Payment must be made in full before accessing paid content. Refund requests may be considered within 14 days of purchase if you have not completed more than 30% of the course content.

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual.content: All course content, including videos, text, images, and materials, is owned by BIKERZ or our content creators. You may not copy, distribute, modify, or create derivative works from our content without express written permission.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Activities
prohibited.content: You agree not to: share your account with others, use automated tools to access our services, attempt to bypass our security measures, post harmful or offensive content, or use our platform for any illegal activities.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: Our courses provide educational content about motorcycle riding. We are not responsible for any injuries, accidents, or damages that may occur while riding. Always practice safety and follow local traffic laws.

governing.title: Governing Law
governing.content: These terms are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Any disputes will be resolved through the appropriate courts in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or through our platform. Your continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions or need help? We're here for you.

form.title: Send Us a Message
form.loggedInDescription: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form.guestDescription: Log in to submit a support ticket and track your request.
form.name: Full Name
form.subject: Subject
form.loginRequired: You need to be logged in to submit a support ticket. This allows you to track your request in your dashboard.
